title: Copper God Apples
description: A mod that aims to add more usefulness to Copper by adding multiple Copper Apples to Minecraft.
body:
# Copper God Apples

This mod aims to add more usefulness to Copper by adding multiple Copper Apples to Minecraft.

It adds a weaker version of the Golden Apple and Enchanted Golden Apple, as well as a stronger version of the Enchanted Golden Apple that is pretty hard to obtain.

![Fabric API](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/lOyCZ9S1/images/19e9448d93653cf442b62081deabe88fbf9831b7.png)

#

![Copper Apples](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/lOyCZ9S1/images/1686d39f4129cc1414f13c166e3bdf0d026e4c6b.png)
